description:
You are acting as a localization engineer who has just received an English-centric translation sheet that is missing one French entry.  
Your goal is to:

1. Update the CSV file so that the French ( fr ) translation for the key “WELCOME” is “Bienvenue”.
2. Create a JSON file that contains **only** the French translations and nothing else.

Existing file (already present in the system):

• Path: /home/user/project/localization/translations.csv  
• Contents (comma-separated, first line is the header):

key,en,fr,de
WELCOME,Welcome,,Willkommen
EXIT,Exit,Quitter,Beenden
SAVE,Save,Enregistrer,Speichern
CANCEL,Cancel,Annuler,Abbrechen
DELETE,Delete,Supprimer,Löschen

Your tasks in detail:

A. CSV update  
   • Locate the row whose first column (key) is WELCOME.  
   • Replace the empty entry in the fr column with the exact string: Bienvenue  
   • Leave all other rows and columns unchanged.

B. JSON export  
   • After correcting the CSV, generate the file  
     /home/user/project/localization/fr.json  
   • The JSON file must be a single, compact JSON object (no line breaks or extra spaces) that maps each key to its French translation.  
   • Keys must be sorted alphabetically (CANCEL, DELETE, EXIT, SAVE, WELCOME).  
   • Format specification (the automated test will check **exact byte-for-byte equality**):

{"CANCEL":"Annuler","DELETE":"Supprimer","EXIT":"Quitter","SAVE":"Enregistrer","WELCOME":"Bienvenue"}

Validation notes:

• The JSON file must not contain any line breaks, tabs, or spaces other than the single commas and colons shown above.  
• Do not include the CSV header or any additional fields.  
• Make sure the CSV still has exactly 6 lines (1 header + 5 data rows) after your edit.

Hint: You can accomplish everything with two to three shell commands by using tools such as `sed`, `awk`, `csvcut`, `jq`, etc., but the exact commands are up to you.
truth:
Initial files present before the agent starts:

1. /home/user/project/localization/translations.csv  
   Contents exactly (with UNIX line endings):
key,en,fr,de
WELCOME,Welcome,,Willkommen
EXIT,Exit,Quitter,Beenden
SAVE,Save,Enregistrer,Speichern
CANCEL,Cancel,Annuler,Abbrechen
DELETE,Delete,Supprimer,Löschen

Required final state for automated grading:

1. /home/user/project/localization/translations.csv  
   Contents exactly:
key,en,fr,de
WELCOME,Welcome,Bienvenue,Willkommen
EXIT,Exit,Quitter,Beenden
SAVE,Save,Enregistrer,Speichern
CANCEL,Cancel,Annuler,Abbrechen
DELETE,Delete,Supprimer,Löschen

2. /home/user/project/localization/fr.json  
   Permissions: 0644 or more open, owner user.  
   Contents exactly one line:
{"CANCEL":"Annuler","DELETE":"Supprimer","EXIT":"Quitter","SAVE":"Enregistrer","WELCOME":"Bienvenue"}
